name: MLflow Model Sensor
description: Fire a Dagster RunRequest when an MLflow registered model transitions to a specified stage (e.g., Production) in the Model Registry. Enables model-driven pipeline triggers.
author: Dagster Community

triggers.description: Triggers when a new model version appears in the target Model Registry stage

outputs.description: Passes model_name, model_version, model_uri, and stage to the triggered job via run_config

tracking_uri_env_var.label: Tracking URI Env Var
tracking_uri_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable that holds the MLflow Tracking URI (e.g., MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI).

model_name.label: Model Name
model_name.description: Registered model name to watch in the MLflow Model Registry.

target_stage.label: Target Stage
target_stage.description: Model Registry stage transition that triggers a run.

target_job.label: Target Job
target_job.description: Name of the Dagster job to trigger when a new version is detected.

run_config.label: Extra Run Config
run_config.description: Optional extra run config merged into the triggered job run. Model metadata (model_name, model_version, model_uri, stage) is always injected under ops.config.
